title: Chicken and Rice Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic tagine dish inspired by Moroccan cuisine, with the addition of French flair.
instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the ginger and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the tagine spice mix, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the grape juice and honey. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 25 minutes.
Add the rice and stir to combine.
Return to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for an additional 20 minutes.
Fluff with a fork and serve.
